schemas.assessmentDescription: Assessment v2 schema for Green Goods gardens. Stores title, description, and location on-chain. The full strategy kernel (diagnosis, SMART outcomes, Cynefin phase, domain, SDG targets, attachments) is stored in IPFS and referenced by assessmentConfigCID.
schemas.assessmentSchema: string title,string description,string assessmentConfigCID,uint8 domain,uint256 startDate,uint256 endDate,string location
schemas.workApprovalDescription: Work approval schema for Green Goods protocol. Allows validators to approve or reject submitted work with feedback and verification confidence scoring, enabling trustless verification of regenerative activities.
schemas.workApprovalSchema: uint256 actionUID,bytes32 workUID,bool approved,string feedback,uint8 confidence,uint8 verificationMethod,string reviewNotesCID
schemas.workDescription: Work submission schema for Green Goods protocol. Enables gardeners to submit completed regenerative agriculture tasks with media evidence and metadata for verification and payment.
schemas.workSchema: uint256 actionUID,string title,string feedback,string metadata,string[] media
